sentences.sentence: When we think of intelligent members of the animal kingdom, the creatures that spring immediately to mind are apes and monkeys.
sentences.translation: 当我们想到动物王国中聪明的成员时，立刻浮现在脑海中的生物是猿和猴。

structure.text: When we think of intelligent members of the animal kingdom
the creatures that spring immediately to mind
that spring immediately to mind
are apes and monkeys

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句；that spring... 修饰 the creatures。
spring to mind 表示‘浮现在脑海中’。

sentences.sentence: But in fact the social lives of some members of the insect kingdom are sufficiently complex to suggest more than a hint of intelligence.
sentences.translation: 但事实上，昆虫王国中一些成员的社会生活复杂到足以显示出不止一丝智慧。

structure.text: in fact
the social lives of some members of the insect kingdom
are sufficiently complex
to suggest more than a hint of intelligence

difficult_points: sufficiently...to... 表示‘足够……以至于……’。
more than a hint of 表示‘不止一丝’。

sentences.sentence: Among these, the world of the ant has come in for considerable scrutiny lately, and the idea that ants demonstrate sparks of cognition has certainly not been rejected by those involved in these investigations.
sentences.translation: 其中，蚂蚁的世界近来受到了相当多的审视，而参与这些研究的人并没有否定蚂蚁展现出认知火花这一观点。

structure.text: Among these
the world of the ant has come in for considerable scrutiny lately
and the idea that ants demonstrate sparks of cognition has certainly not been rejected by those involved in these investigations
that ants demonstrate sparks of cognition
involved in these investigations

difficult_points: the idea 后的 that 从句是同位语，具体说明观点内容。
has not been rejected 是现在完成时被动语态；involved 修饰 those。

sentences.sentence: Ants store food, repel attackers and use chemical signals to contact one another in case of attack.
sentences.translation: 蚂蚁储存食物、抵御攻击者，并在遭到攻击时用化学信号相互联系。

structure.text: Ants
store food, repel attackers and use chemical signals
to contact one another in case of attack

difficult_points: 三个动词 store、repel、use 构成并列谓语。
in case of attack 表示‘万一遭到攻击时’。

sentences.sentence: Such chemical communication can be compared to the human use of visual and auditory channels (as in religious chants, advertising images and jingles, political slogans and martial music) to arouse and propagate moods and attitudes.
sentences.translation: 这种化学交流可以与人类利用视觉和听觉渠道来激发并传播情绪和态度相比较（例如宗教吟唱、广告图像和短曲、政治口号及军乐）。

structure.text: Such chemical communication
can be compared to the human use of visual and auditory channels
as in religious chants, advertising images and jingles, political slogans and martial music
to arouse and propagate moods and attitudes

difficult_points: be compared to 表示‘与……相比较’。
to arouse and propagate 是并列目的不定式，说明使用渠道的目的。

sentences.sentence: The biologist Lewis Thomas wrote, 'Ants are so much like human beings as to be an embarrassment.
sentences.translation: 生物学家刘易斯·托马斯写道：‘蚂蚁与人类如此相像，简直令人尴尬。’

structure.text: The biologist Lewis Thomas
wrote
Ants are so much like human beings as to be an embarrassment
so much like human beings as to be an embarrassment

difficult_points: so...as to... 表示‘如此……以至于……’。
引号内是 wrote 的直接引语。

sentences.sentence: They farm fungi, raise aphids* as livestock, launch armies to war, use chemical sprays to alarm and confuse enemies, capture slaves, engage in child labour, exchange information ceaselessly.
sentences.translation: 它们培育真菌，把蚜虫*当作牲畜饲养，派遣军队作战，用化学喷剂惊扰并迷惑敌人，俘获奴隶，从事童工劳动，还不断交换信息。

structure.text: They
farm fungi, raise aphids* as livestock, launch armies to war, use chemical sprays to alarm and confuse enemies, capture slaves, engage in child labour, exchange information ceaselessly

difficult_points: 多个并列动词连续列举蚂蚁的社会行为。
use chemical sprays 后接两个并列目的不定式 to alarm and confuse。

sentences.sentence: They do everything but watch television.'
sentences.translation: 除了看电视，它们什么都做。

structure.text: They
do everything but watch television

difficult_points: everything but... 表示‘除了……什么都做’。
but 后的 watch 是省略 to 的不定式。

sentences.sentence: However, in ants there is no cultural transmission—everything must be encoded in the genes—whereas in humans the opposite is true.
sentences.translation: 然而，蚂蚁不存在文化传承——一切都必须编码在基因中——而人类恰恰相反。

structure.text: However
in ants there is no cultural transmission
everything must be encoded in the genes
whereas in humans the opposite is true

difficult_points: there is 结构说明蚂蚁不存在 cultural transmission。
whereas 引导对比从句，the opposite 指人类存在文化传承。

sentences.sentence: Only basic instincts are carried in the genes of a newborn baby; other skills being learned from others in the community as the child grows up.
sentences.translation: 新生儿的基因中只携带基本本能；其他技能则是在孩子成长过程中从社区成员那里学来的。

structure.text: Only basic instincts are carried in the genes of a newborn baby
other skills being learned from others in the community as the child grows up
as the child grows up

difficult_points: other skills being learned 是独立主格结构，补充说明另一种情况。
are carried 使用被动语态，表示本能被遗传在基因中。

sentences.sentence: It may seem that this cultural continuity gives us a huge advantage over ants.
sentences.translation: 看起来，这种文化连续性似乎让我们比蚂蚁拥有巨大优势。

structure.text: It may seem
that this cultural continuity gives us a huge advantage over ants

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
give someone an advantage over 表示‘使某人比……有优势’。

sentences.sentence: They have never mastered fire nor progressed.
sentences.translation: 它们从未掌握用火，也从未进步。

structure.text: They
have never mastered fire nor progressed

difficult_points: have never... nor... 表示‘从未……也未……’。
progressed 与 mastered 并列，共用 have。

sentences.sentence: Their fungus farming and aphid herding crafts are sophisticated when compared to the agricultural skills of humans five thousand years ago but have been totally overtaken by modern human agribusiness.
sentences.translation: 与五千年前人类的农业技能相比，它们培育真菌和放牧蚜虫的技艺很先进，但已经完全被现代人类农业企业超越。

structure.text: Their fungus farming and aphid herding crafts
are sophisticated when compared to the agricultural skills of humans five thousand years ago
when compared to the agricultural skills of humans five thousand years ago
but have been totally overtaken by modern human agribusiness

difficult_points: when compared to 是省略的被动比较结构，完整为 when they are compared。
have been overtaken 是现在完成时被动语态，表示已被超越。

sentences.sentence: Or have they?
sentences.translation: 真的是这样吗？

structure.text: Or
have they

difficult_points: 省略问句，they 指代蚂蚁，完整意思是‘或者它们真的没有进步吗’。
现在完成时 have they 呼应上文 have been overtaken。

sentences.sentence: The farming methods of ants are at least sustainable.
sentences.translation: 至少，蚂蚁的耕作方法是可持续的。

structure.text: The farming methods of ants
are
at least sustainable

difficult_points: at least 表示让步限定，意为‘至少’。
sustainable 是表语，说明方法不会耗尽环境资源。

sentences.sentence: They do not ruin environments or use enormous amounts of energy.
sentences.translation: 它们不会破坏环境，也不会消耗巨量能量。

structure.text: They
do not ruin environments or use enormous amounts of energy

difficult_points: do not...or... 表示两个并列否定行为。
enormous amounts of 修饰不可数名词 energy。

sentences.sentence: Moreover, recent evidence suggests that the crop farming of ants may be more sophisticated and adaptable than was thought.
sentences.translation: 此外，最新证据表明，蚂蚁的作物种植可能比人们原先认为的更加复杂且适应性更强。

structure.text: Moreover
recent evidence
suggests
that the crop farming of ants may be more sophisticated and adaptable than was thought

difficult_points: that 引导 suggests 的宾语从句。
than was thought 是省略结构，完整为 than it was thought to be。

sentences.sentence: Ants were farmers fifty million years before humans were.
sentences.translation: 蚂蚁比人类早五千万年就已经是农民了。

structure.text: Ants
were farmers
fifty million years before humans were

difficult_points: before humans were 中 were 代替 were farmers，避免重复。
fifty million years before 表示时间早于人类五千万年。

sentences.sentence: Ants can't digest the cellulose in leaves—but some fungi can.
sentences.translation: 蚂蚁无法消化叶子中的纤维素——但某些真菌可以。

structure.text: Ants
can't digest the cellulose in leaves
but some fungi can

difficult_points: can 在 but 从句中代替 can digest the cellulose，避免重复。
破折号突出蚂蚁与真菌能力的对比。

sentences.sentence: The ants therefore cultivate these fungi in their nests, bringing them leaves to feed on, and then use them as a source of food. Farmer ants secrete antibiotics to control other fungi that might act as 'weeds', and spread waste to fertilise the crop.
sentences.translation: 因此，蚂蚁在巢穴中培育这些真菌，带来叶子供它们食用，然后把真菌当作食物来源。农蚁分泌抗生素来控制可能充当‘杂草’的其他真菌，并通过散布废物为作物施肥。

structure.text: The ants therefore cultivate these fungi in their nests
bringing them leaves to feed on
to feed on
and then use them as a source of food
Farmer ants secrete antibiotics
to control other fungi that might act as 'weeds'
that might act as 'weeds'
and spread waste to fertilise the crop

difficult_points: bringing... 是现在分词短语，补充说明蚂蚁如何培育真菌。
that might act as 'weeds' 修饰 other fungi；to control 和 to fertilise 表示目的。

sentences.sentence: It was once thought that the fungus that ants cultivate was a single type that they had propagated, essentially unchanged from the distant past.
sentences.translation: 人们曾经认为，蚂蚁培育的真菌是一种单一类型，是它们繁殖出来的，与遥远的过去基本没有变化。

structure.text: It was once thought
that the fungus that ants cultivate was a single type that they had propagated
that ants cultivate
that they had propagated
essentially unchanged from the distant past

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句作 thought 的宾语。
两个 that 从句分别修饰 fungus 和 type；had propagated 是过去完成时。

sentences.sentence: Not so.
sentences.translation: 事实并非如此。

structure.text: Not so

difficult_points: 省略句，完整意思是‘It was not so’。
so 代指上一句所述的观点。

sentences.sentence: Ulrich Mueller of Maryland and his colleagues genetically screened 862 different types of fungi taken from ants' nests.
sentences.translation: 马里兰州的乌尔里希·穆勒及其同事对从蚂蚁巢穴中取出的862种不同真菌进行了基因筛查。

structure.text: Ulrich Mueller of Maryland and his colleagues
genetically screened
862 different types of fungi taken from ants' nests
taken from ants' nests

difficult_points: taken from ants' nests 是过去分词短语，修饰 fungi。
screened 在此表示‘筛查、检测’，genetically 修饰该动作。

sentences.sentence: These turned out to be highly diverse: it seems that ants are continually domesticating new species.
sentences.translation: 结果证明这些真菌具有高度多样性：蚂蚁似乎在不断驯化新的物种。

structure.text: These turned out to be highly diverse
it seems that ants are continually domesticating new species
that ants are continually domesticating new species

difficult_points: turn out to be 表示‘结果证明是’。
it seems that 中 it 是形式主语，that 从句说明推测内容。

sentences.sentence: Even more impressively, DNA analysis of the fungi suggests that the ants improve or modify the fungi by regularly swapping and sharing strains with neighbouring ant colonies.
sentences.translation: 更令人印象深刻的是，对这些真菌的DNA分析表明，蚂蚁通过定期与邻近蚁群交换和分享菌株来改良或改变真菌。

structure.text: Even more impressively
DNA analysis of the fungi
suggests that the ants improve or modify the fungi
by regularly swapping and sharing strains with neighbouring ant colonies

difficult_points: that 引导 suggests 的宾语从句。
by swapping and sharing 是 by 加动名词，说明改良真菌的方式。

sentences.sentence: Whereas prehistoric man had no exposure to urban lifestyles—the forcing house of intelligence—the evidence suggests that ants have lived in urban settings for close on a hundred million years, developing and maintaining underground cities of specialised chambers and tunnels.
sentences.translation: 史前人类从未接触过城市生活——这种生活是智慧的温床——而证据表明，蚂蚁生活在城市环境中已有近一亿年，建造并维护着由专门巢室和隧道组成的地下城市。

structure.text: Whereas prehistoric man had no exposure to urban lifestyles
the forcing house of intelligence
the evidence suggests that ants have lived in urban settings for close on a hundred million years
developing and maintaining underground cities of specialised chambers and tunnels

difficult_points: Whereas 引导对比从句；破折号内是对 urban lifestyles 的同位说明。
developing and maintaining 是现在分词短语，逻辑主语是 ants。

sentences.sentence: When we survey Mexico City, Tokyo, Los Angeles, we are amazed at what has been accomplished by humans.
sentences.translation: 当我们考察墨西哥城、东京和洛杉矶时，会惊叹于人类所取得的成就。

structure.text: When we survey Mexico City, Tokyo, Los Angeles
we are amazed at
what has been accomplished by humans

difficult_points: what has been accomplished 是介词 at 后的宾语从句。
has been accomplished 是现在完成时被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Yet Hölldobler and Wilson's magnificent work for ant lovers, The Ants, describes a supercolony of the ant Formica yessensis on the Ishikari Coast of Hokkaido.
sentences.translation: 然而，赫尔多布勒和威尔逊为蚂蚁爱好者创作的杰作《蚂蚁》描述了北海道石狩海岸一群Formica yessensis蚂蚁组成的超级群落。

structure.text: Hölldobler and Wilson's magnificent work for ant lovers, The Ants
The Ants
describes
a supercolony of the ant Formica yessensis on the Ishikari Coast of Hokkaido

difficult_points: The Ants 是前面 work 的同位语，表示作品名称。
of the ant Formica yessensis 和 on the Ishikari Coast 都是后置修饰成分。

sentences.sentence: This 'megalopolis' was reported to be composed of 360 million workers and a million queens living in 4,500 interconnected nests across a territory of 2.7 square kilometres.
sentences.translation: 据报道，这座‘大都市’由3.6亿只工蚁和100万只蚁后组成，它们生活在横跨2.7平方公里、彼此相连的4500个巢穴中。

structure.text: This 'megalopolis'
was reported to be composed of 360 million workers and a million queens
living in 4,500 interconnected nests across a territory of 2.7 square kilometres

difficult_points: was reported to be 是‘据报道是’的被动结构。
living 分词短语修饰 workers and queens；interconnected 修饰 nests。

sentences.sentence: Such enduring and intricately meshed levels of technical achievement outstrip by far anything achieved by our distant ancestors.
sentences.translation: 这种持久且精密交织的技术成就，远远超过了我们远古祖先取得的一切。

structure.text: Such enduring and intricately meshed levels of technical achievement
outstrip by far
anything achieved by our distant ancestors
achieved by our distant ancestors

difficult_points: achieved by our distant ancestors 是过去分词短语修饰 anything。
outstrip by far 表示‘远远超过’。

sentences.sentence: We hail as masterpieces the cave paintings in southern France and elsewhere, dating back some 20,000 years.
sentences.translation: 我们把法国南部及其他地方可追溯到约两万年前的洞穴壁画誉为杰作。

structure.text: We
hail as masterpieces
the cave paintings in southern France and elsewhere
dating back some 20,000 years

difficult_points: hail A as B 表示‘把A誉为B’。
dating back 修饰 cave paintings，表示年代可追溯至很久以前。

sentences.sentence: Ant societies existed in something like their present form more than seventy million years ago.
sentences.translation: 七千多万年前，蚂蚁社会就已经大致呈现今天的形态。

structure.text: Ant societies
existed
in something like their present form
more than seventy million years ago

difficult_points: something like 表示‘大致像、差不多是’。
more than... ago 是时间状语。

sentences.sentence: Beside this, prehistoric man looks technologically primitive.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，史前人在技术上显得很原始。

structure.text: Beside this
prehistoric man
looks technologically primitive

difficult_points: Beside this 在此表示‘与此相比’，不是‘在旁边’。
looks 后接形容词 primitive 作表语。

sentences.sentence: Is this then some kind of intelligence, albeit of a different kind?
sentences.translation: 那么，这是否算是一种智慧，只不过是不同类型的智慧？

structure.text: Is this then some kind of intelligence
albeit of a different kind

difficult_points: albeit 是 although 的正式替代词，表示‘尽管、虽然’。
of a different kind 省略了 intelligence，表示类型不同。

sentences.sentence: Research conducted at Oxford, Sussex and Zürich Universities has shown that when desert ants return from a foraging trip, they navigate by integrating bearings and distances, which they continuously update in their heads.
sentences.translation: 牛津、萨塞克斯和苏黎世大学开展的研究表明，沙漠蚂蚁觅食归来时，会整合方向和距离来导航，并在头脑中不断更新这些信息。

structure.text: Research conducted at Oxford, Sussex and Zürich Universities
conducted at Oxford, Sussex and Zürich Universities
has shown that when desert ants return from a foraging trip, they navigate by integrating bearings and distances, which they continuously update in their heads
when desert ants return from a foraging trip
they navigate by integrating bearings and distances
which they continuously update in their heads

difficult_points: has shown 后接 that 宾语从句，when 从句嵌在其中。
which 指代 bearings and distances，by integrating 表示导航方式。

sentences.sentence: They combine the evidence of visual landmarks with a mental library of local directions, all within a framework which is consulted and updated.
sentences.translation: 它们把视觉地标提供的证据与本地方向的心理数据库结合起来，所有信息都置于一个会被查阅和更新的框架中。

structure.text: They
combine the evidence of visual landmarks with a mental library of local directions
all within a framework which is consulted and updated
which is consulted and updated

difficult_points: combine A with B 表示‘把A与B结合’。
which is consulted and updated 修饰 framework，使用被动语态。

sentences.sentence: So ants can learn too.
sentences.translation: 所以蚂蚁也能学习。

structure.text: So
ants
can learn too

difficult_points: So 表示根据前文得出的结论。
too 放在句末表示‘也’。

sentences.sentence: And in a twelve-year programme of work, Ryabko and Reznikova have found evidence that ants can transmit very complex messages.
sentences.translation: 在一项为期12年的研究中，里亚布科和列兹尼科娃发现了蚂蚁能够传递非常复杂信息的证据。

structure.text: in a twelve-year programme of work
Ryabko and Reznikova
have found evidence
that ants can transmit very complex messages

difficult_points: that 从句是 evidence 的同位语，说明证据内容。
have found 是现在完成时，表示研究发现对现在仍有意义。

sentences.sentence: Scouts who had located food in a maze returned to mobilise their foraging teams.
sentences.translation: 在迷宫中找到食物的侦察蚁返回去动员觅食队伍。

structure.text: Scouts who had located food in a maze
who had located food in a maze
returned
to mobilise their foraging teams

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 Scouts；had located 表示先发生的找到食物。
to mobilise 表示返回的目的。

sentences.sentence: They engaged in contact sessions, at the end of which the scout was removed in order to observe what her team might do.
sentences.translation: 它们进行接触交流，在交流结束时把侦察蚁移走，以观察她的队伍会做什么。

structure.text: They engaged in contact sessions
at the end of which the scout was removed
in order to observe what her team might do
what her team might do

difficult_points: 介词 which 结构 at the end of which 指代 contact sessions。
what her team might do 是 observe 的宾语从句；in order to 表目的。

sentences.sentence: Often the foragers proceeded to the exact spot in the maze where the food had been.
sentences.translation: 觅食蚁常常会走到迷宫中食物原来所在的准确位置。

structure.text: Often
the foragers
proceeded to the exact spot in the maze
where the food had been

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句，修饰 spot。
had been 表示食物先前所在的位置。

sentences.sentence: Elaborate precautions were taken to prevent the foraging team using odour clues.
sentences.translation: 人们采取了周密的预防措施，防止觅食队伍利用气味线索。

structure.text: Elaborate precautions
were taken
to prevent the foraging team using odour clues

difficult_points: were taken 是被动语态，表示采取措施。
prevent 后接宾语加现在分词 using，表示阻止某队伍使用气味线索。

sentences.sentence: Discussion now centres on whether the route through the maze is communicated as a 'left-right' sequence of turns or as a 'compass bearing and distance' message.
sentences.translation: 目前的讨论集中在：穿过迷宫的路线究竟是以‘左右’转弯序列传递，还是以‘罗盘方向和距离’的信息传递。

structure.text: Discussion now centres on
whether the route through the maze is communicated as a 'left-right' sequence of turns or as a 'compass bearing and distance' message
through the maze

difficult_points: whether...or... 引导介词 on 的宾语从句，提出两种传递方式。
is communicated 使用被动语态，as 表示‘以……形式’。

sentences.sentence: During the course of this exhaustive study, Reznikova has grown so attached to her laboratory ants that she feels she knows them as individuals—even without the paint spots used to mark them.
sentences.translation: 在这项详尽研究期间，列兹尼科娃逐渐对实验室里的蚂蚁产生了深厚感情，以至于即使没有用来标记它们的颜料斑点，她也觉得自己能认出每一只蚂蚁。

structure.text: During the course of this exhaustive study
Reznikova has grown so attached to her laboratory ants
that she feels she knows them as individuals
she knows them as individuals
even without the paint spots used to mark them
used to mark them

difficult_points: so...that... 表示结果；feels 后又嵌套 she knows 宾语从句。
used to mark them 修饰 paint spots，表示斑点的用途。

sentences.sentence: It's no surprise that Edward Wilson, in his essay, 'In the company of ants', advises readers who ask what to do with the ants in their kitchen to: 'Watch where you step.
sentences.translation: 难怪爱德华·威尔逊在《与蚂蚁为伴》一文中建议那些询问如何处理厨房蚂蚁的读者：‘走路时看好脚下。’

structure.text: It's no surprise
that Edward Wilson, in his essay, 'In the company of ants', advises readers who ask what to do with the ants in their kitchen to
in his essay, 'In the company of ants'
who ask what to do with the ants in their kitchen
what to do with the ants in their kitchen

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句说明‘不令人惊讶’的事实。
who 修饰 readers，what to do 是 ask 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Be careful of little lives.'
sentences.translation: 小心那些微小的生命。’

structure.text: Be careful of little lives

difficult_points: 祈使句省略主语 you，be careful of 表示‘当心’。
little lives 指蚂蚁，以拟人化方式表达尊重。
